nodes.name: rip2IfConfTable
nodes.description:
A list of subnets which require separate
           configuration in RIP.

nodes.name: extended
nodes.description: The MIB module to describe the RIP2 Version 2 Protocol

children.name: rip2GlobalRouteChanges
children.description:
The number of route changes made to the IP Route
            Database by RIP.  This does not include the refresh
            of a route's age.

nodes.name: rip2IfStatTable
nodes.description:
A list of subnets which require separate
            status monitoring in RIP.

children.name: rip2IfStatEntry
children.description: A Single Routing Domain in a single Subnet.

children.name: rip2IfStatRcvBadRoutes
children.description:
The number of routes, in valid RIP packets,
            which were ignored for any reason (e.g. unknown
            address family, or invalid metric).

children.name: rip2IfStatRcvBadPackets
children.description:
The number of RIP response packets received by
            the RIP process which were subsequently discarded
            for any reason (e.g. a version 0 packet, or an
            unknown command type).

children.name: rip2IfStatStatus
children.description:
Writing invalid has the effect of deleting
           this interface.
